extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters against the Company from matters filed by the Company, and separately lists proceedings against Directors and matters filed by Promoters. I counted the against rows only: criminal cases are 1 against the Company plus 1 against Directors; statutory/regulatory actions are 3 against the Company; and Central Excise tax proceedings are 9 against the Company. The quantified aggregate against the Company is ₹1,76,273 + ₹31,77,760 + ₹1,17,68,501 + ₹1,02,75,000 = ₹2,59,97,534, or 2.5997534 crore; all 'filed by' rows were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹1,853.14 lakhs as at March 31, 2019, converted to ₹18.5314 crore; the source uses ₹ for litigation amounts and lakhs for contingent liabilities, so the source unit is mixed. The company-wide top-five customer concentration is 26.03% of total revenue from operations for the full fiscal year ended March 31, 2019; no company-wide top-ten percentage is disclosed.
